direction: from is the grammatical subject: from -relation-> to
authority_policy: Cella Papers_Library is canonical; Encyclopedia audit/ is a pre-reorg scaffold (paths stale). claim_status reflects mathematical truth independent of lifecycle_status (document state). Node ids are namespaced 'DBP:'; resolve to canonical E/B ids via source_refs pointer->sha256 against audit/DAG_CROSSWALK.csv. Non-destructive: retire/supersede, never delete.

reachability_legend.EASY: one mechanical step / merge of an already-proven result
reachability_legend.MODERATE: bounded new lemma from in-corpus building blocks
reachability_legend.WALL: genuinely open or refuted; needs new mathematics
reachability_legend.INVARIANT: protected restriction, must remain (not an artificial fence)

nodes.label: Paper I — Active Role-Jet Orbit Calculus
nodes.summary: S3 birational role action, Orbit Theorem, 3-channel K_G split, gauge transport. Standalone canonical Paper I.

nodes.label: Paper II — Parity-fixed inverse-channel normal forms (general)
nodes.summary: General local curvature calculus: -m(m+5)/B parity law, generic collapse, corner vertex rule. KN paper cites this.

nodes.label: Paper II — Kerr-Newman role-divisor retrodiction
nodes.summary: u=0 metric selection, rationality, reflection coeffs, strict-negative extremal via Sturm. Cites pfc.

nodes.label: Paper III — DBP Curvature Periods of the DBP Quadric
nodes.summary: Consolidated Paper III (hash matches corpus-cited canonical). Contains CCE-2 but NOT CCE-5/CCE-6: lambda unresolved (L1543), informal thin-tube (L1559). Mathematically incomplete though released; see gaps III1/III2/III3.

nodes.label: Paper IV — Galois Theory of the Horizon Cover
nodes.summary: Splitting/temperature, S5 obstruction, Kummer modules, wreath closures, realization poset. Covers k=4,5. Publication package established (normalized incidence, branch ideal 8*e3(w), inertia catalogue).

nodes.label: Paper V — Selected Quotient Groupoids (HELD capstone, not yet written)
nodes.summary: Held capstone gated behind SQG-E/SQG-C/R3. Foundations proved; equivalence/closure/three-way coherence open; full unreduced carrier equivalence REFUTED.

nodes.label: Invariant-Preservation Theorem 8.1 (abstract)
nodes.summary: Additive phi=phi_K+phi_sym; kappa=0/kappa>0 dichotomy. Independent companion of the Orbit Theorem.

nodes.label: Canonical Invariant Reduction Theorem
nodes.summary: Channel exact sequence + SOLE proof of the Lorentzian single-edge corollary (nu, 2I-J sig (2,1)).

nodes.label: Gauge Channel Transport Law
nodes.summary: Keystone transport laws + SOLE full Lorentzian pinning derivation.

nodes.label: DBP Curvature Role Reduction (research map)
nodes.summary: S∧S bilinear channel split (proven+measured); Gauss-Lovelock elevation; order-3+ holonomy tower [OPEN].

nodes.label: THEOREM_CANDIDATES (measured finite bound)
nodes.summary: 5298-class finite bound measured over a frozen atlas; general n=3 converse deferred though proved in-family (Theorem H).

nodes.label: Three-Channel KG New-Math Extension (n>=4 grid)
nodes.summary: Ambient-n sigma2 triple + explicit n=4 Gauss-Kronecker channel grid, closed form.

nodes.label: CCE-8 finite-tower naturality
nodes.summary: tau_{N,r}(w f)=w tau_{N,r}(f) all finite N>=r>=2, all words. 53 assertions passed.

nodes.label: Local Curvature Calculus COMPLETE (proof spine)
nodes.summary: Lamé engine, decomposition Thm 3.1, weighted initial-form 7.7, codim-k Cor 7.6. Superset of pfc.

nodes.label: Local Curvature Calculus COMPANION
nodes.summary: Reference sheet; merge-then-retire into COMPLETE; unique §9 dual-constants block belongs to the periods family.

nodes.label: LEAD7 variable-transverse weighted-jet theorem
nodes.summary: Leading laws hold for arbitrary transverse functions on nondegenerate stratum P1/P0+R1/R0!=0.

nodes.label: DBP Landen-Trace Theorem COMPLETE v1.1
nodes.summary: Atomic proof authority across the corpus; anti-translation sector corrected (MR-002); verifier re-runs every gate.

nodes.label: CCE-5 Absolute Calibration Theorem
nodes.summary: lambda_up=B, lambda_down=-B, braid M↑/M↓, trace (a,b,c)=(1,0,0). 61 assertions passed. PROMOTED.

nodes.label: CCE-6 Native Surface-Sweep Clearance Theorem
nodes.summary: Disc_Xi(N)=-4(1-c)TD2, Res=c^2 D1^2, eps*=1/105186307200. 16+19 assertions passed.

nodes.label: ALL_K Monodromy Theorem Note
nodes.summary: Math is PROVED for all k>=3 (via GS proof) but the note still LABELS it a conjecture with GS as an 'open lemma'. Splice pending (gap IV1). Certified k=3..6 groups S4/S5/S16/S22.

nodes.label: GS Generic Morse Lemma Proof
nodes.summary: Proves (GS) for all k>=3; ships a §9 splice script; discharges ALL_K's open lemma.

nodes.label: R9 Static Closure Opening Derivation
nodes.summary: rank-10 valuation matrix -> full conjugate Kummer-wreath closure C_2^2≀S_5.

nodes.label: Rotating Three-Channel Wreath Closure
nodes.summary: C_2^3≀S_5 rotating closure.

nodes.label: Kummer Module Wreath Lift Theorem
nodes.summary: General (G,d) wreath lift; §11 states the all-k interface.

nodes.label: GALOIS_K_ELLIPSE Research Map v1_6 (true head)
nodes.summary: Program dashboard, verified newest on disk (supersedes v1.1/v1_3/v1_4). Rows R8/R9/R10/R11 present solved results as open.

nodes.label: Self-Glue Monodromy (imprimitive wreath)
nodes.summary: Independent companion paper; n-stage iterated wreath proven only symbolically for n=2,3.

nodes.label: Selected Quotient Groupoids Foundation
nodes.summary: SQG category Thm 3.1, flat scalar-ext functor 4.1; presentation-equivalence is a NOTION only, not proved.

nodes.label: R3 AC-Fold Independent Realization Theorem
nodes.summary: Independent AC fold; skeleton functor Z->C_2 full+ess-surj but NOT faithful (kernel 2Z); does not itself prove three-way coherence.

nodes.label: DBP Paper Ensemble Architecture
nodes.summary: Architecture/reference (NOT a theorem certificate). SOLE holder of the Paper V gate spec (Thm E/C) and the §7.3 elliptic (a,b,c) trace-path gap. Orphan risk if retired.

nodes.label: Cella Continuation Engine (CCE-1..8 + post-8)
nodes.summary: Continuation-engine campaign; owns CCE-2..8 stage theorems + the AR/gap ledgers.

nodes.label: Artificial-Restriction Live Reconciliation (AR-01..26, PI-01..12)
nodes.summary: The repo's own artificial-restriction ledger + protected invariants. Doctrine: a release floor / refusal / nonclaim is NOT a ban on investigation.

nodes.label: AR-20 authorized editorial workflow (paper-insertion gate)
nodes.summary: Proved results are promoted into papers only through the user-authorized editorial workflow. Gate node for all EASY paper insertions.

nodes.label: Frozen-atlas RoleChSpec converse (general n=3)
nodes.summary: Candidate F calls the n=3 converse 'measured/open' though Theorem H already proves it symbolically on the full regular locus. Two campaigns never reconciled.

extensions.next_object: Merge Theorem H/Lemma H4 biconditional RoleChSpec_g(H1)=RoleChSpec_g(H2) <=> O_g(H2-H1)=0 (regular Q-locus, char!=2) into Candidate F; leave only n>=4 open.

nodes.label: All-finite-order active-role induction (written out)
nodes.summary: App.A stops at 'third-order reach proceeds identically'; CCE-8 already proves the recurrence for every finite order.

extensions.next_object: Write the order-r Faà-di-Bruno / Lagrange-inversion induction closing T_sigma(j^r f) in Q[jet,a^-1]; cite CCE-8 as the verified instance.

nodes.label: n>=4 / ambient-n channel grid into canonical paper
nodes.summary: Canonical paper restricts to n=3/order-2; the n=4 grid is already written closed-form.

extensions.next_object: Insert the ambient-n sigma2 channel triple + explicit n=4 K_{p,q} grid; drop the 'n=3' clause.

nodes.label: Gauss-Lovelock channel tower for general k
nodes.summary: Verified only k=1,2 by hand + sigma4 measured; split is bilinear so induction on k is bounded.

extensions.next_object: Prove Lambda_{k,j;p,q} channelisation by expanding the fixed Lovelock contraction of the bilinear S∧S split.

nodes.label: Tensor-level active-recharting covariance
nodes.summary: Covariance proven only at scalar level; both the tensor split and gauge transport exist to compose. Shared wall with Paper II gap II4.

extensions.next_object: Prove the (0,4) channel tensor transforms covariantly under active S3 recharting (off-diagonal replay of the curvature identity).

nodes.label: Order-3+ role-jet / holonomy channel split
nodes.summary: Generating function already gives every order x channel; only the HolSpec_r variant is genuinely new.

extensions.next_object: Read order-3 channels off the fingerprint chi(z;t,u); isolate the one new object = cubic third-fundamental-form holonomy channel.

nodes.label: Codimension >=3 corner vertex/cancellation identity
nodes.summary: Cor 7.6 already gives the vertex set for codim-k mechanically; only per-face cancellation classification unrun.

extensions.next_object: Extend pfc_test3_vertex_rule.py from (s,x,y) to (s,x,y,z): extract polar vertices C_a(P)/(2h_a) and cancellation loci; same closed-identity method, one extra coordinate.
Compute in_w(R) front polynomial as a function of the projective ratio rho + the two face germs, generalizing KN's mixed term M (k=2 instance), via Thm 7.7.

nodes.label: Curvature-Valence crown experiment B1
nodes.summary: Fully chartered fork (sector -28=2*(-14) vs balanced -84); never run under GO though the rig exists.

extensions.next_object: Commit the B1 PREDICT log, run the spectator-fan-wall battery measuring the wedge-edge leading coefficient across a=1, decide P-A/P-B/P-C. Rig already reproduces the KN wedge.

nodes.label: Off-diagonal role-rechart covariance (curvature replay)
nodes.summary: Diagonal laws closed on nondegenerate stratum; off-diagonal tensor pullback still required. Shared wall with Paper I gap I5.

extensions.next_object: Extend the Laurent-jet ring to a non-diagonal germ; add off-diagonal Christoffel/Ricci cross-terms; re-run the valuation replay; check whether cross-terms alter the x^-3/x^-4 coefficients.

nodes.label: Second-surface realization of the local-type calculus
nodes.summary: Paper asserts portability to 'any diagonal inverse-channel thermodynamic surface'; unrealized on any second surface. A second n=3 surface -> MODERATE.

extensions.next_object: Run the portable local-type table on a second surface, e.g. Reissner-Nordström (n=2, unique assembly, no selection problem); report divisor orders.

nodes.label: Insert calibrated lambda into Paper III §7F
nodes.summary: CCE-5 PROMOTED (machine-verified); pure merge of a certified result into the paper.

extensions.next_object: Replace the 'independent unresolved corrections' (L1543) and symbolic lambda in 7F.10 with proved lambda_up=B, lambda_down=-B and trace integers (1,0,0)/(1,0,1); cite the CCE-5 gate.

nodes.label: De-stale Paper III 'Not claimed' block

extensions.next_object: Delete the two nonclaims 'exact A/B coefficients comparing Gamma_+/Gamma_-' and 'complete A/B monodromy matrices on the full relative basis' (both proved by CCE-5); move to a 'now proved (CCE-5)' note.

nodes.summary: Local germs at 0,1/2,1,inf PROMOTED; full-plane groupoid still open.

nodes.label: Smith form / integral intersection of the native inclusion
nodes.summary: Whole-surface surjectivity REFUTED (rank 4 in 12); the saturation sub-parts remain reachable.

nodes.label: Two DBP-arm reduction functors into common skeleton
nodes.summary: Full unreduced carrier equivalence REFUTED; explicit reduced-skeleton functors remain a valid target.

extensions.next_object: Construct the two DBP reduction functors on a common object domain + componentwise full/faithful/ess-surj checks (work-queue #6).

nodes.label: Three-way coherence of the reduced realizations

extensions.next_object: After V2, prove the componentwise coherence diagrams among the three realizations.
Prove the four named closure defs: normal-symmetry subgroupoid quotient; admissible base change w/ section preservation; fibre-product transversality; functorial inertia/wall/valuation labels.
Build compositional complex-disk enclosures per opcode + SQRT/DIV branch/zero witnesses + program-derived Cauchy majorant + tail-schedule theorem (work-queue #2).

nodes.label: Generic complex braid / wall transport (Paper IV)
nodes.summary: Real static walls typed; the eliminant-discriminant shortcut is REFUTED (P8-19). Was WALL, now MODERATE with the incidence import.

extensions.next_object: Produce the factorized normalized-incidence ramification ideal + local-inertia ledger, then exact meridian paths (work-queue #5).

nodes.label: Splice GS proof into the ALL_K note (mark Thm D PROVED)
nodes.summary: GS proof ships its own splice script; a PROVEN all-k theorem sits behind a stale 'conjecture' label. Unblocks IV2/IV3/IV5.

extensions.next_object: Execute the GS §9 splice: replace ALL_K §7, mark Theorem D PROVED for all k>=3, delete the 'conjecture / single remaining obstruction' wording.

nodes.label: Fold all-k base monodromy into the released paper
nodes.summary: Paper covers 4 charges only; its own open-problem (i) is now answered by the proven all-k base monodromy.

extensions.next_object: Add an all-k base section (or assemble the planned Galois-arm capstone) folding Thm A/B/C/D + GS into the manuscript.
Instantiate the general-(G,d) wreath-lift at G=S_{delta_k}, s=2 static channels; re-derive the entropy-sum square class via e_k symmetric functions; verify parity rows -> C_2^2≀S_{delta_k}.

nodes.label: Flip stale R9 closure OPEN tags to RESOLVED(k=4)
nodes.summary: R9 marked OPEN in 3+ docs though static and rotating closures are proven.

extensions.next_object: Update the R9 status tags to RESOLVED(k=4), cross-citing the static (C_2^2≀S_5) and rotating (C_2^3≀S_5) closure derivations.

nodes.summary: Four rows present solved results as the headline open questions.

extensions.next_object: Promote R8->Established, R9->Resolved(k=4), R10 k=5-group->Established, R11->Established; update the live-fronts list.

nodes.label: self_glue n-fold iterated wreath (all n)
nodes.summary: Only degrees proven; the wreath law is proven per-layer, only the iterated assembly is unworked.

extensions.next_object: Prove the n-fold iterated wreath S_{m_D}≀...≀S_{m_D} by induction on seams using the §4 Lemma A/B already in hand.

nodes.label: Ambient background curvature does not channelise (KC8)
nodes.summary: R̄ is nonlinear in the metric; channelisation needs bilinearity. Proven wall / validity boundary.

nodes.label: RoleChSpec survival/injectivity for n>=4
nodes.summary: n=3 proof is a rank-3 linear recovery; n>=4 has many channels and no established rank argument.

nodes.label: General-n mixed-bidegree grid interior
nodes.summary: Only three edges mapped; the mixed interior is unmapped new representation theory.

nodes.label: Singular-strata classification theorem
nodes.summary: Chart-failure -> characteristic channel/orbit behaviour is a real open theorem, not a replay.

nodes.label: Mixed front coefficient not recoverable from the exponent matrix alone
nodes.summary: Proven structural fact: needs the full front metric. Correctness boundary that gap II2 works within.

nodes.label: Finite-jet tower has no uniform depth after arbitrary cancellation
nodes.summary: Genuinely open; the tower may die at level 2. Not lifted by any in-hand method.

nodes.label: Native swept image is NOT the whole surface lattice
nodes.summary: REFUTED: rank H2(X,Y;Z)=12 vs native image rank<=4. Protects PI-09.

nodes.label: AC-fold reduction functor is NOT faithful
nodes.summary: REFUTED: kernel 2Z (even winding lost). Keep explicit; do not fake equivalence.

nodes.label: Unreduced full-carrier equivalence (role/horizon/elliptic)
nodes.summary: REFUTED by incompatible fibre type/dimension/isotropy/monodromy. Positive theorem must use explicit reductions.

nodes.label: Eliminant discriminant is NOT a complete ramification oracle
nodes.summary: REFUTED: projected sheet crossings != ramification.

nodes.label: Scalar relation between the two special values / 2nd real dual region / transcendence
nodes.summary: Genuinely open: needs new relative-homology path comparison. Paper III 'Not claimed'.

nodes.label: Primary<->dual Landen transformation
nodes.summary: I_primary(l)=alpha(sqrt2) I_dual(1-l)+corr — targeted but unproven; new elliptic transformation content.

nodes.label: Rotating physical selection / indefinite spectral geometry (R13b)
nodes.summary: Indefinite pencil, no off-the-shelf tool; distinct from the (done) algebraic rotating rank-jump.

nodes.label: Higher-codimension collision-stratum realization/transversality
nodes.summary: Explicitly NOT mechanical from the inertia theorem; a remaining geometric task.

nodes.label: self_glue non-separable cross-terms
nodes.summary: Breaks the clean radical tower; a genuine hypothesis, not a convenience.
